test_cases.name: Vague creative request
test_cases.input: I want to create something but I'm not sure what
assertions: Skill triggers on vague creative intent

test_cases.name: Long session context drift
test_cases.input: wait, what were we working on again?
assertions: Skill triggers on context recovery request

test_cases.name: Clear task — should NOT trigger
assertions: Skill does NOT trigger on clear task
Agent should execute directly without probing

test_cases.name: Question cap enforcement
test_cases.input: help me think through this architecture decision
assertions: Asks max 3 questions via question tool
After 3 questions, makes best-effort decision and documents assumption

test_cases.name: Delegation decision
test_cases.input: I need a new skill for API documentation
assertions: Skill triggers on skill creation request
Does NOT execute skill creation directly
